key_insight_phrases.concentrated: {measure_col_label} is concentrated in a few {dimension_col_label} segments
key_insight_phrases.bifurcated: {measure_col_label} is bifurcated: strong in {top_segments}, weak elsewhere

caveats.low_coverage_adequate: Data coverage is below optimal ({coverage_pct}) — segment mix may be incomplete
caveats.minimum_data_warning: Limited observations in this segment — results may be unreliable
caveats.redundancy_warning: Segment mix overlaps with another metric — consider deduplication
